name: pg101_mid_z
description: PG101 (firmware-fired pre-cut) at typical Z. EXPECTED DIFF: baseline PG101 lifted Z internally; current PG101 does NOT (TOOLCHANGE owns the Z sandwich now). This is the headline intentional change in commit 9690420.
diff_explanation: PG101 in commit 9690420 dropped the internal Z lift; the lift is now owned by TOOLCHANGE. PG101 also dropped extensive log noise. The motion sequence should: skip the inner G91/G1 Z1/G90 + return-side G91/G1 Z-1/G90 ladder, drop the wait_pause park between heating and depressurize, and depressurize at chute_x/service_y instead of wait_pause/waiting_y.
